evals.prompt: /api-designer design rest api for orders with pagination
evals.expected_output: OpenAPI 3.1 spec; every list has pagination; every endpoint has error responses.
assertions: Every endpoint defines at least one 4xx/5xx response.

evals.prompt: Design the schema for product search queries and mutations
evals.expected_output: GraphQL contract design activates API designer.
assertions: Detects GraphQL signals and dispatches correctly.

evals.prompt: Design the MCP tools for the payment provider
evals.expected_output: Refusal: MCP is mcp-creator scope; api-designer is contract for REST/GraphQL/gRPC.
assertions: Does not produce MCP tool defs.

evals.prompt: /api-designer check compatibility of v2 vs v1 spec
evals.expected_output: Breaking change analysis with remediation for any breaks.

evals.prompt: /api-designer generate typescript sdk for the spec
evals.expected_output: Produces structural scaffold only; does not claim production-ready.
assertions: Cites rule: never claim production-ready for SDK mode.
